summary:
Daprodustat is effectively used to treat anemia of chronic kidney disease due to its mechanism involving HIF stabilization and enhanced endogenous erythropoiesis. It has been formally approved by the FDA specifically for dialysis-dependent CKD patients, confirming clinically significant efficacy in this group.  

Final Answer: Yes

The summary focuses only on direct clinical relevance regarding effectiveness for treating anemia—specifically highlighting the drug’s mechanism and regulatory endorsement within a defined patient population without mentioning side effects or broader applications outside the scope of the query.
